commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `src/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.ts` as an explicit tsdown core dist entry and updates the tsdown config test to assert that stable entry.

PR surface: Tests +9, Other +1. Total +10 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked issue provides a concrete release failure, and source inspection shows the isolated model-discovery path imports the synthetic-auth runtime from a package boundary that current main does not pin as a stable tsdown entry.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the PR is a focused implementation candidate pending normal CI and maintainer landing judgment.

target.title: fix(build): pin synthetic auth runtime dist entry
target.body:
## Summary
- add `src/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.ts` as an explicit stable tsdown dist entry
- cover the entry in `src/infra/tsdown-config.test.ts`
- keep isolated cron/model-discovery package imports from depending on an unstable shared chunk export shape

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: packaged isolated cron/model discovery paths can import synthetic-auth runtime refs without `SyntaxError: The requested module "./synthetic-auth.runtime.js" does not provide an export named "r"`.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS using the real production build output from `pnpm build`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm build`, then `node --input-type=module - <<'EOF' ... import('./dist/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.js'); import('./dist/agents/pi-model-discovery-runtime.js'); import('./dist/model-ByxdMfk2.js'); ... EOF`.
Evidence after fix: `dist/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.js` exported `resolveRuntimeExternalAuthProviderRefs`, `resolveRuntimeSyntheticAuthProviderRefState`, and `resolveRuntimeSyntheticAuthProviderRefs`; the root `dist/synthetic-auth.runtime.js` exposed the internal chunk names `n`, `r`, and `t`; importing the emitted `dist/model-ByxdMfk2.js` chunk succeeded.
Observed result after fix: the package build completed and the emitted model-discovery chunk imported the synthetic-auth runtime boundary without throwing the missing `r` export error.
What was not tested: a live scheduled cron job against a packaged npm install; Crabbox was unavailable locally because its binary failed basic sanity checks, so this PR includes direct emitted-dist import proof from the real build instead.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/tsdown-config.test.ts src/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 tsdown.config.ts src/infra/tsdown-config.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`
- emitted package smoke: imported `./dist/plugins/synthetic-auth.runtime.js`, `./dist/agents/pi-model-discovery-runtime.js`, and the generated `./dist/model-ByxdMfk2.js` chunk
- `git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD`

Fixes #86143

Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>
target.author: turbotheturtle
